stemHtml: Air Traffic Control may require an aircraft to make routine meteorological reports of air temperature, wind direction and speed, and any icing or turbulence experienced. During climb an aircraft with data link communication equipment are…

options.a: Expected to report every 30 seconds during the climb-out phase for the first 10 minutes of the flight.
options.b: Required to report at a normal ATS reporting point, approximately every 30 minutes.
options.c: Exempt from the need to make such reports unless specifically required by ATC.
options.d: Obliged to report every 30 minutes, regardless of the aircraft’s position.
